title: Shields Awesome Adventures
description: This modpack is full of many QOL mods and many mods to improve framerates. It will give you a good experience without straying to much from vanilla Minecraft.
body:
This Modpack Is Full of mods that increase frames and create a better playing experience without straying from the game to much. It has many different types of shaders and rescource packs to give you many options. If you wnat you can add as many mods as you want to make it as modded as you want. But this mod aims to give you a close to vanilla experience while also makeing minecraft alot more fun and interesting.
This mod only add a couple new items and should be perfect for you to play if you want a fresh experience.
